## Type of change
- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `data` ‚Äî data pipeline
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî code restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî tests only
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî config, dependencies, tooling
- [ ] `exp` ‚Äî experimental

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `develop`
- [ ] Code is formatted ‚Äî `black .` and `ruff check .` pass
- [ ] Tests pass locally ‚Äî `pytest`
- [ ] No secrets, data files, or model weights committed
- [ ] New functions/classes have docstrings
- [ ] README or docs updated if needed
